name: AD Mixtape · 1970s Japanese Jazz Mixtape // Jazz-funk, Soul Jazz, Rare Groove & Beyond
description: バイブon this from 2017: the first entry of Osaka-based (French) dj & record collector, Dckne's three part series, digging 1970s Japanese jazz/funk/groove.

tracks.track: Take Five (Bamboo, 1970, United artists records) 2. Terumasa Hino 日野皓正 Quartet – Soulful (Alone, Alone and Alone, 1967, takt Jazz Seies) 3. Hiroshi Suzuki 鈴木弘 – Kuro to Shiro (Cat, 1975, Nippon-Columbia) 4. Teruo Nakamura 中村照夫 – Some other Blues (Unicorn, 1973, Three Blind Mice) 5. Takeshi Inomata & Sound Limited 猪俣猛とサウンドリミテッド – Mustache (Sounds Of Sound L.T.D., 1970, Takt Jazz Seies) 6. Jiro Inagaki & Soul Media 稲垣次郎とソウルメディア – Raven Speaks (In the Groove, 1973, Nippon-Columbia) 7. Sunao Wada Quintet + 1 和田直クインテット＋１- Sunset on the Street (Four Scenes, 1976, Three Blind Mice) 8. Kosuke Mine Quintet 峰厚介クインテット – Dream Eyes (Mine, 1970, Three Blind Mice) 9. Shigeo Sekito セキトオ シゲオ – The World II (Special Sound Series Vol. 2, 1975, Nippon-Columbia)
